prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise engine room at night, flickering warm warning lights, rain reflections against portholes. Kai Harbor, an androgynous figure in elegant evening wear with a damp coat, firmly holds a wall panel steady. Elias Thorne, a masculine figure in a weatherproof jacket over formal attire with a camera strap, uses a repair tool on the panel. Cooperative maintenance, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous engine room shot, consistent lighting and character positions. Elias Thorne completes the adjustment to the panel while Kai Harbor keeps the panel aligned. The flickering warning lights stabilize to a steady glow, indicating a successful repair. Cinematic anime realism, no text, no watermark.
